description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a steeply pitched gable roof clad in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement of four windows on each floor, flanking a central black door. The exterior walls are clad in light wood paneling, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The property is enclosed by a white and black picket fence, and includes a detached garage or shed with a sloped roof, as well as a red car parked on a driveway. The backyard area is open, with a small covered patio or awning attached to the rear of the house. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on symmetry and traditional residential elements.
description: A two-story wooden house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a central front door, set within a fenced yard with a detached garage and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central black door, four windows on each floor, red car on the left, and detached garage on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, wood paneling, car parked along the side, and the detached garage structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with a small covered patio or awning, and the garage positioned to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, the car parked outside the fence, and the garage further in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Central black door with no porch, flanked by windows, and a simple step up from the yard
